name: sienna
description: Manage Instagram publishing and analyze Meta Ads, Google Ads, Adjust reports, and creative performance through Sienna's parallel Query Agent.

interface.shortDescription: Manage social publishing and advertising analytics with Sienna.
interface.longDescription: Manage Instagram publishing and analyze Meta Ads, Google Ads, Adjust reports, and creative performance through Sienna's parallel Query Agent.
defaultPrompt: Connect Instagram and safely prepare a social post.
Analyze recent ad performance and explain the strongest creative patterns.
Compare Meta and Google campaign performance for the last seven days.
